data.body: EARLY-LAND decision (skill's early-land exception): completion verifier checks origin/main (verified_at_sha 6244666), where in-review autolander code is absent -> S2a/S2c FAIL 'file does not exist'. The S1->S2c stack is fully green (all LLM+1 & Verified+1, submittable=True, 0 unresolved). Regression-safety: changes are additive + DORMANT (new infra/autolander module + tests, not wired to any entrypoint yet; S5 deploys it) + S1 config already cut over; CI ran on exact merge trees; nil blast radius on existing behavior -> clears the bar. Submitting stack (tip #585 -> ancestors #582/#583/#584) to land on main, then closing S2 tree (verifier will see the code).
